heroHeadline: Ukraine Claims Russia Supplied Iran with Targeting Coordinates for Israeli Energy Grid
heroSubtitle: Kyiv alleges Moscow provided Tehran with precise coordinates for Israeli energy infrastructure, deepening concerns over Russia-Iran military cooperation extending beyond the Ukraine theater
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
